segments.text: Go yet, love a woman beloved of her friend, yet an adulteress, according to the love of the LORD toward the children of Israel, who look to other gods, and love flagons of wine.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So I bought her to me for fifteen pieces of silver, and for an homer of barley, and an half homer of barley:
Thou shalt abide for me many days; thou shalt not play the harlot, and thou shalt not be for another man: so will I also be for thee.
segments.speaker: Hosea

segments.text: For the children of Israel shall abide many days without a king, and without a prince, and without a sacrifice, and without an image, and without an ephod, and without teraphim:
segments.speaker: Hosea

footnotes: image: Heb. a standing, or, statue, or, pillar

segments.text: Afterward shall the children of Israel return, and seek the LORD their God, and David their king; and shall fear the LORD and his goodness in the latter days.
segments.speaker: Hosea
